case_title: SILVESTER, JOHN vs. CALIFORNIA CULINARY ACADEMY et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SILVESTER, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA CULINARY ACADEMY DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUN-02-2000 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-28-2000 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAY-15-2000
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR MAY-09-2000 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 212

PROOF OF SERVICE OSC CALENDAR OF MAY-09-2000, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT HEARING ON MAY-09-2000, SANCTIONS AGAINST PLTF IN PRO PER JOHN SILVESTER., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAY-24-2000 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUN-02-2000, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO OBTAIN ANSWER OR ENTER DEFAULT; TO PAY OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS. NO ENTRY OF DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT UNTIL ALL OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS ARE PAID. OSC TO PLTF SILVESTER JOHN. HEARING SET FOR JUL-12-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF JUL-12-2000, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON JUL-12-2000, TO FILE POS AND OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT. OSC AND SANCTIONS AGAINST PLTF IN PRO PER JOHN SILVESTER, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING DATE., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUL-27-2000 CONTINUED FROM JUL-12-2000 TO SEP-20-2000 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
OSC CALENDAR OF SEP-20-2000, DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 525. SANCTIONS IMPOSED ON 5-9-00, AND 7-12-00 ARE VACATED.
